title: HCF and LCM
summary: HCF and LCM is a focused topic inside Real Numbers. It is mainly about finding highest common factor and least common multiple using euclid's algorithm and prime factorization.
bullet_points: Goal: Compute HCF and LCM and connect them to product relationships|Difficulty band: medium|Chapter: Real Numbers

title: Trigonometric Ratios
summary: Trigonometric Ratios is a focused topic inside Introduction to Trigonometry. It is mainly about defining sine, cosine, and tangent using right triangles.
bullet_points: Goal: Translate triangle side lengths into trigonometric ratios|Difficulty band: easy|Chapter: Introduction to Trigonometry

title: Area of a Triangle in Coordinates
summary: Area of a Triangle in Coordinates is a focused topic inside Coordinate Geometry. It is mainly about computing triangle area from coordinate pairs and detect collinearity.
bullet_points: Goal: Use determinant-style formulas for area-based reasoning|Difficulty band: medium|Chapter: Coordinate Geometry
